title: Quickshot
description: adds some fun and fast ranged weapons
body:
**_a mod focused on adding fun, fast paced ranged weapons_**

---

this mod currently adds **5 new ranged weapons**:

---

**Tactical Crossbow:** A faster, more specialized version of the normal crossbow. It can only load normal arrows, but it can load 3 at the same time. The arrows loaded can be shot by pressing the left mouse button.

**Barrel Blast:** Is a hand cannon that is, as the name suggests, made of a barrel. It can be charged using gunpowder, the charges can be released by left clicking, if you sneak you will release all charges at once. Releasing a charge will cause significant knockback to yourself and everything directly in front of you, it will also negate your fall damage.

**Netherite Hand Plate:** A small plate of netherite attached to your hand. You can attach iron nuggets to it by right clicking, all attached nuggets will be shot out if you left click. All iron nuggets shot by you will ignore i-frames when hitting a mob and will also drop as items if they hit something.

**Ender Kunai:** It can be thrown by right clicking, the projectile will bounce of walls 2 times, it will teleport you on the third time. As long as it hasn't teleported you, it will pierce through all enemies in it's path. On the second bounce, it will bounce directly towards a mob if there is a valid target nearby, otherwise it will bounce normally. After 2 seconds of airtime it will also teleport you, but every bounce resets airtime. It can be found in end cities.

**Grip Shot:** It acts like grappling hook. You can shoot it at a location by right clicking and then it will pull you towards that location.

most weapons can be crafted and enchanted

---

the mod also adds some **new weapon specific enchantments**:

**Overload:** Increases the loading capacity of the Item. [can be applied to the **_Tactical Crossbow_**, but it will work with most weapons of the mod]

**Precision:** Makes Projectiles, shot by the Weapon more precise. [can be applied to the **_Tactical Crossbow_** and the **_Grip Shot_**]

**Cocktail Bolt:** Converts Arrows, shot by the Tactical Crossbow into random negative Tipped Arrows. [can be applied to the **_Tactical Crossbow_**]

**Hot Burst:** Blasts fron the Barrel Blast ignite targets. [can be applied to the **_Barrel Blast_**]

**Chain Reaction:** Gives you the ability to chain shots together by only triggering a one second cooldown after a specific amount of uses. [can be applied to the **_Barrel Blast_**]

**Attraction:** Makes the Iron Nuggets you shot, return to you. [can be applied to the **_Netherite Hand Plate_**]

**Sharpening:** Slightly increases the damage of the Iron Nuggets you shot, it also makes them pierce through enemies and their armor. [can be applied to the **_Netherite Hand Plate_**]

**Safety Chain:** Makes you immune to all Fall Damage while being attached to something through the Grip Shot. [can be applied to the **_Grip Shot_**]

---

**Showcase: _at [09:48](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=104_kElLAD0&t=588s) in the Video_**
